---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

# Description
A clear and concise description of the feature and the problem it solves. Explain the motivation - why is this needed and who benefits from it.

# Guidelines
Before submitting, please verify:
- [ ] This feature does not duplicate an existing open issue
- [ ] The feature is scoped to a single layer (Backend / Frontend / IoT) or clearly spans multiple layers with justification
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are defined in the Task list below

# Proposed Solution
Describe the approach you have in mind. Include any relevant technical details, library suggestions, or architectural considerations.

# Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you considered and why you ruled them out.

# Task List

- [ ]
- [ ]
